formal_strategy_baseline: ONE_SHOT_DONCHIAN_ATR_BREAKOUT 1.0.0 on BTCUSDT-PERP; fixed background only
question: Can a fixed equal-capital DOGE/XRP/ADA basket of continuous equal-quantity spot-long/perpetual-short hedges retain funding-dominated profit after stress costs and a 4% annual capital hurdle across sequential periods?
allocation: one-third fully-funded pair capital per symbol; no rebalancing inside a phase
development_gate: data PASS; stress raw and after 4% hurdle >0; 2021/2022 each base >0; all 3 assets total >0; max drawdown >-10%; funding > absolute basis
evaluation_gate: data PASS; stress raw and after hurdle >0; 2023 base >0; at least 2/3 assets >0; max drawdown >-10%; funding > absolute basis
confirmation_gate: data PASS; stress raw and after hurdle >0; 2024 and 2025-to-Aug each base >0; at least 2/3 assets >0; max drawdown >-10%; funding > absolute basis; evaluation+confirmation >0
conclusion_rule: SUPPORTS_WITHIN_SCOPE only if all sequential gates pass; negative confirmation or combined is DOES_NOT_SUPPORT; other failure is INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE.
confirmation_release_rule: Only after evaluation passes, fetch core universe 2024-01 through 2025-09 with official public archives/checksums and REST gap fill; record manifest identity before analysis.
known_exposure: 2021-2023 underlying data and a sparse event-triggered carry rule were exposed; this always-on equal-capital basket was not run. 2024-2025 core 8h data is not downloaded before both gates.
small_capital_limit: Six simultaneous legs increase minimum order, rounding, fee tier, monitoring and partial-fill risk; this may make the basket unsuitable below an account-specific capital floor not established here.
